title: alnus sibirica
intro: Alnus sibirica, also known as the Siberian alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Alnus sibirica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. In herbal preparations, Alnus sibirica is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and can also be used as a natural dye and in traditional cooking.
